chosen_action.title: Create a single-target channel-ready outreach draft for ctxt.dev / Signum

why_this_action.summary: The strongest untouched publisher target still lacked a send-ready single-message asset, and the runtime could not directly execute its Telegram path from the current Matrix-bound context. Converting the generic multi-target packet into a channel-ready manual asset is the highest-leverage local move that still improves the odds of a real Codeberg-first citation send today.

expected_outcome: Immediate manual send on the strongest untouched publisher target with Codeberg-first positioning preserved.

measurement_window.success_metric: Confirmed send on either the site contact path or Telegram, then any reply, mention, citation, backlink, or attributable qualified repo inspection.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If still unsent by the review checkpoint, replace this lane instead of refreshing another ctxt.dev-specific draft.
